zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane de Calthorpe於1446年出生在英國素福爾可巴恩哈姆時，她的父親James de Calthorpe26歲，母親Alice Astley11歲。她於從1465年1月10日到1466年1月9日與Thomas Peyton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane de Calthorpe于1446年出生在英国素福爾可巴恩哈姆时，她的父亲James de Calthorpe26岁，母亲Alice Astley11岁。她于从1465年1月10日到1466年1月9日与Thomas Peyton在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane de Calthorpe was born in 1446, in Barnham, Suffolk, England, her father, James de Calthorpe, was 26 and her mother, Alice Astley, was 11. She married Thomas Peyton from 10 January 1465 to 9 January 1466, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1498, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane de Calthorpe est née en 1446, à Barnham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, James de Calthorpe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Astley, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Peyton du 10 janvier 1465 au 9 janvier 1466, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1498, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane de Calthorpe 1446 in Barnham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Calthorpe 26 und ihre Mutter Alice Astley 11. Sie hat von 10. Januar 1465 bis 9. Januar 1466 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1498 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane de Calthorpe è nata il nel 1446 nel Barnham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, James de Calthorpe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice Astley, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Peyton da 10 gennaio 1465 a 9 gennaio 1466, nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1498, nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane de Calthorpeが1446年にイギリススフォルクバーンハムで生まれた時，父James de Calthorpeは26歳，母Alice Astleyは11歳であった。から1465年1月10日まで1466年1月9日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムでThomas Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane de Calthorpe(이)가 1446년 영국 수폴크 바른함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Calthorpe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Astley(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1465년 1월 10일부터 1466년 1월 9일까지 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 Thomas Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1465: de 10 de janeiro de 1465 a 9 de janeiro de 1466
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane de Calthorpe nasceu em 1446, em Barnham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Calthorpe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Astley, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Peyton de 10 de janeiro de 1465 a 9 de janeiro de 1466, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1498, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane de Calthorpe родилась в 1446 г. в местности барнам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени James de Calthorpe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Astley, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Peyton с 10 января 1465 по 9 января 1466 в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1498 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.
